mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment (id, order_id, amount, payment_method, status, provider_ref, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{orderId}, #{amount}, #{paymentMethod}, #{status}, #{providerRef}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, amount, payment_method, status, provider_ref, created_at, updated_at FROM payment
mapper.update: UPDATE payment SET order_id = #{orderId}, amount = #{amount}, payment_method = #{paymentMethod}, status = #{status}, provider_ref = #{providerRef}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
